---
proposal_id: 62eb94c9-fc8a-4a80-9c7c-3d5d53b49e3f
source: proposifyai
client_company: "ModAE (Win-Track)"
client_name: "ModAE (Win-Track)"
client_email: ""
title: "ModAE ProposifyAI TechnoCommercial"
proposal_status: "draft"
template_id: null
ai_confidence_score: 0
created_at: 2026-05-14T12:28:25.639509+00:00
pricing_total: null
project: Proposals
---# ModAE ProposifyAI TechnoCommercial

**Client:** ModAE (Win-Track)
**Status:** draft  ·  **Created:** 2026-05-14

---

{
  "rawHtml": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<title>ModAE ProposifyAI — Techno-Commercial Proposal — Betser Life</title>\n<style>\n* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\nbody { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif; background: #e8e8e8; color: #1C2B4A; }\n\n.page {\n  width: 210mm; height: 297mm;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  margin: 10px auto; background: white;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);\n  display: flex; flex-direction: column;\n}\n@media print {\n  body { background: white; }\n  .page { margin: 0; box-shadow: none; page-break-after: always; }\n  .page:last-child { page-break-after: avoid; }\n  @page { size: A4; margin: 0; }\n}\n\n:root {\n  --navy: #1C2B4A;\n  --gold: #C9A93F;\n  --text: #374151;\n  --muted: #6B7280;\n  --border: #E5E7EB;\n  --bg: #F8F9FB;\n}\n\n/* Shared */\n.section-badge { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3.5px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; }\n.section-heading { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1.2; }\n.body-content { padding: 26px 36px; }\n.divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }\n.body-p { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 8px; }\n.body-p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }\n.fn { font-size: 9.5px; color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.5; }\n\n/* COVER */\n.cover {\n  background: var(--navy);\n  height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column;\n  padding: 44px 44px 36px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;\n}\n.cover::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-80px; right:-80px; width:360px; height:360px; border-radius:50%; border:55px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }\n.cover::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:-50px; right:50px; width:220px; height:220px; border-radius:50%; border:44px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }\n.cover-accent { width:44px; height:3px; background:var(--gold); margin-bottom:28px; }\n.cover-label { font-size:9px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:14px; }\n.cover-title { font-size:34px; font-weight:800; color:white; line-height:1.15; margin-bottom:14px; max-width:430px; }\n.cover-subtitle { font-size:12.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); line-height:1.6; max-width:400px; }\n.cover-meta { margin-top:auto; display:flex; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-top:28px; }\n.cover-meta-col { flex:1; padding-right:18px; }\n.cover-meta-col + .cover-meta-col { border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-left:18px; padding-right:0; }\n.cover-meta-label { font-size:8px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2.5px; color:var(--gold); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px; }\n.cover-meta-name { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:white; margin-bottom:3px; }\n.cover-meta-sub { font-size:10px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); line-height:1.5; }\n\n/* Deliverables */\n.deliverable-list { display:flex; flex-direction:column; }\n.deliverable-item { display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:flex-start; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }\n.deliverable-item:last-child { border-bottom:none; }\n.del-num { width:24px; height:24px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--navy); color:white; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:1px; }\n.del-title { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:2px; }\n.del-desc { font-size:10px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.5; }\n\n/* Cards */\n.card-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:8px; }\n.card-grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; }\n.report-card, .sec-card { border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px; padding:10px; background:white; }\n.card-icon { font-size:16px; margin-bottom:5px; display:block; }\n.card-title { font-size:10.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:3px; }\n.card-desc { font-size:9.5px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.5; }\n\n/* Lead quote */\n.lead-quote {\n  border-left:3px solid var(--gold); padding:10px 14px;\n  background:var(--bg); border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;\n  margin:10px 0; font-size:11px; line-height:1.65; color:var(--text);\n}\n\n/* Timeline */\n.timeline { position:relative; padding-left:26px; }\n.timeline::before { content:''; position:absolute; left:7px; top:6px; bottom:6px; width:2px; background:var(--border); }\n.timeline-item { position:relative; margin-bottom:12px; }\n.timeline-item:last-child { margin-bottom:0; }\n.timeline-dot { position:absolute; left:-22px; top:3px; width:14px; height:14px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); border:2px solid white; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--gold); }\n.timeline-week { font-size:8px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2.5px; color:var(--gold); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:2px; }\n.timeline-phase { font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:3px; }\n.timeline-desc { font-size:10px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.55; }\n\n/* Pricing table */\n.pricing-table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:10.5px; margin-top:4px; }\n.pricing-table thead tr { background:var(--navy); }\n.pricing-table thead th { padding:8px 10px; text-align:left; font-size:8px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }\n.pricing-table thead th:last-child { text-align:right; }\n.pricing-table tbody tr { border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }\n.pricing-table tbody td { padding:7px 10px; color:var(--text); vertical-align:middle; }\n.pricing-table tbody td:last-child { text-align:right; font-weight:600; color:var(--navy); }\n.pricing-table .subtotal-row td { background:var(--bg); font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); }\n.pricing-table .total-row { background:var(--navy); }\n.pricing-table .total-row td { padding:9px 10px; color:white; font-weight:700; }\n.pricing-table .total-row td:last-child { color:var(--gold); font-size:13px; text-align:right; }\n.pricing-table .contingency-row td { color:var(--muted); font-style:italic; }\n\n/* Payment cards */\n.payment-cards { display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:12px; }\n.payment-card { flex:1; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px; padding:13px; text-align:center; }\n.payment-pct { font-size:24px; font-weight:800; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:4px; }\n.payment-amt { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:4px; }\n.payment-note { font-size:9.5px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.4; }\n\n/* Terms */\n.terms-list { list-style:none; padding:0; }\n.terms-list li { position:relative; padding:5px 0 5px 15px; font-size:10.5px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.55; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }\n.terms-list li:last-child { border-bottom:none; }\n.terms-list li::before { content:'\\2022'; position:absolute; left:0; color:var(--gold); font-size:14px; top:3px; }\n\n/* Footer */\n.footer-band { background:var(--navy); padding:18px 36px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }\n.footer-left .f-name { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:white; }\n.footer-left .f-email { font-size:10px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top:2px; }\n.footer-center { font-size:10px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3); text-align:center; }\n.footer-right { text-align:right; }\n.footer-right .f-client { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); }\n.footer-right .f-address { font-size:9.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top:2px; line-height:1.4; }\n.footer-confidential { background:#111d35; padding:6px 36px; font-size:8px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:2.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.22); text-align:center; text-transform:uppercase; }\n\n/* Page footer strip */\n.page-footer { margin-top:auto; padding:8px 36px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; border-top:1px solid var(--border); }\n.page-footer-left { font-size:8px; color:var(--muted); }\n.page-footer-right { font-size:8px; color:var(--muted); }\n\n/* Process flow */\n.process-step { display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:flex-start; padding:6px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }\n.process-step:last-child { border-bottom:none; }\n.step-num { width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--bg); color:var(--navy); font-size:9px; font-weight:700; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; border:1px solid var(--border); }\n.step-title { font-size:10.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:1px; }\n.step-desc { font-size:9.5px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.5; }\n\n/* Bullet list compact */\n.bullet-list { list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0; }\n.bullet-list li { position:relative; padding:3px 0 3px 12px; font-size:10px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.55; }\n.bullet-list li::before { content:'\\2022'; position:absolute; left:0; color:var(--gold); font-size:12px; top:2px; }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 1 — COVER\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"cover\">\n    <div class=\"cover-accent\"></div>\n    <div class=\"cover-label\">Techno-Commercial Proposal</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-title\">ModAE ProposifyAI</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-subtitle\">AI-Powered Proposal Automation System &mdash; Phase 1: Flow Proposal (Quotation) Automation + Phase 2: Project Proposal Automation, natively within Microsoft 365</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-meta\">\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Submitted By</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Betser Life Pvt. Ltd.</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">admin@betserlife.com<br>betserlife.com &middot; Lotus Tower, Thiruvananthapuram</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Submitted To</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Mode AE</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Spare Parts &amp; Services<br>Dubai, UAE</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Date</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">April 2026</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Ref: BTR-2026-MODAE-02<br>Valid for 30 days</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Proposal Value</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\" style=\"color:var(--gold);font-size:17px;\">INR 5,90,000</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Phase 1 + Phase 2 + GST<br>Cloud-native M365 deployment</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 2 — EXECUTIVE SUMMARY + PAIN POINTS\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">01 &mdash; Overview</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Executive Summary</div>\n    <div class=\"lead-quote\">\n      Betser Life Pvt. Ltd. is pleased to present this revised techno-commercial proposal for the deployment of <strong>ModAE ProposifyAI</strong> &mdash; an AI-powered proposal automation system tailored to Mode AE's operational requirements. <strong>Phase 1 (Flow Proposal Automation)</strong> automates the end-to-end quotation workflow from email intake and knowledge base lookup through to document generation and customer dispatch, now with an <strong>embedded CRM module</strong> for logging customer data, quotation amounts, salesperson details, and sales pipeline tracking. <strong>Phase 2 (Project Proposal Automation)</strong> extends the platform with intelligent scope analysis, HW/SW/services breakdown, multi-currency conversion, and full terms generation. Both phases operate natively within Mode AE's <strong>Microsoft 365 ecosystem</strong> (Outlook, SharePoint, Excel).\n    </div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">Mode AE operates in a competitive spare parts and services business environment where speed and accuracy of quotation directly impact win rates. The company receives enquiries from multiple contractors and companies, requiring fast, accurate responses.</p>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">The current quotation generation process is manual, involving salesperson-led email review, knowledge base lookups, document preparation, and dispatch. This creates delays, increases the risk of pricing errors, and limits scalability as enquiry volumes grow.</p>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">ModAE ProposifyAI will automate every step &mdash; while preserving the <strong>KYC verification step under human control</strong>, ensuring compliance and customer due diligence. The solution is designed for rapid deployment, minimal disruption to existing operations, and immediate measurable impact on quotation turnaround time, accuracy, and sales team productivity.</p>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex:1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">02 &mdash; Problem Statement</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Current Pain Points</div>\n    <div class=\"deliverable-list\">\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\" style=\"background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);\">!</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Manual Email Processing</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Manual email reading and data extraction is time-consuming and prone to omission errors. Salespersons must manually extract customer name, company, contact details, and line items from each enquiry.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\" style=\"background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);\">!</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Slow Knowledge Base Lookup</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Lookup across a large Spare Parts Price List (PDF) and Service Rate Sheet is slow and error-prone. Matching part numbers and descriptions manually is tedious and risks pricing mistakes.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\" style=\"background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);\">!</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">No Automated RFQ Tracking</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">No automated tracking of RFQ status, values, or dispatch &mdash; relying on manual Excel updates. This creates visibility gaps and delays in pipeline management.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\" style=\"background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);\">!</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">High Per-Quotation Effort</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">High salesperson effort per quotation reduces bandwidth for higher-value activities like client relationship management and deal closing.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\" style=\"background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);\">!</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Scalability Constraints</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Volume growth directly increases headcount requirements. The current process cannot scale without proportional increases in manpower cost.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\" style=\"background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);\">!</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">No Integrated CRM / Sales Tracking</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Customer data, quotation amounts, salesperson assignments, and pipeline status are scattered across emails and spreadsheets. No centralised CRM view for sales visibility and accountability.</div></div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"page-footer-left\">Betser Life &middot; admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com</div>\n    <div class=\"page-footer-right\">Mode AE &middot; BTR-2026-MODAE-02</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 3 — CURRENT PROCESS + REQUIREMENT SUMMARY\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">03 &mdash; As-Is Process</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Current Quotation Workflow</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\" style=\"margin-bottom:10px;\">The following 8-step manual process is currently followed by Mode AE for every quotation request:</p>\n    <div style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column;\">\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">1</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">Enquiry Receipt</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Emails arrive in the designated mailbox requesting quotations for spare parts and/or services.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">2</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">Manual Email Review</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Salesperson reads the email, extracts customer details, part numbers, quantities, and service requirements manually.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">3</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">KYC Verification</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Manual customer verification and KYC check before proceeding with quotation preparation.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">4</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">RFQ Logging</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Data entry into Excel tracker &mdash; customer details, enquiry date, type, and line items recorded manually.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">5</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">Proposal Number Generation</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Unique proposal number generated manually in Excel following Mode AE's convention (e.g. MDA-2026-XXXX).</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">6</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">Quotation Preparation</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Manual lookup across Spare Parts Price List (PDF) and Service Rate Sheet. Line items matched, priced, and compiled into quotation document.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">7</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">Excel Tracker Update</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Quotation value, status, and details updated manually in the RFQ tracker spreadsheet.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"process-step\">\n        <div class=\"step-num\">8</div>\n        <div><div class=\"step-title\">Review and Dispatch</div>\n        <div class=\"step-desc\">Quotation reviewed internally, then emailed manually to the customer with the document attached.</div></div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex:1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">04 &mdash; Requirements</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Requirement Summary</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\" style=\"margin-bottom:8px;\">Mode AE requires an intelligent automation layer that:</p>\n    <ul class=\"bullet-list\">\n      <li>Monitors and processes incoming quotation enquiry emails automatically</li>\n      <li>Validates customer KYC status (manual step retained) and triggers automation post-clearance</li>\n      <li>Extracts line items from the enquiry and matches them to the Spare Parts Price List and Service Rate Sheet</li>\n      <li>Generates a formatted quotation document using Mode AE's standard template</li>\n      <li>Updates the RFQ tracker (Excel/SharePoint) automatically</li>\n      <li>Routes the quotation for internal review and, upon approval, dispatches it to the customer via email</li>\n      <li>Logs customer data, quotation values, and salesperson details in an embedded CRM for pipeline visibility</li>\n      <li>Operates entirely within Mode AE's Microsoft 365 environment</li>\n    </ul>\n    <div class=\"lead-quote\" style=\"margin-top:12px;\">\n      <strong>What stays manual:</strong> KYC Verification remains a manual touchpoint, triggered before automation proceeds. This ensures compliance and customer due diligence are preserved under human oversight.\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"page-footer-left\">Betser Life &middot; admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com</div>\n    <div class=\"page-footer-right\">Mode AE &middot; BTR-2026-MODAE-02</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 4 — SCOPE OF WORK (7 Modules)\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex:1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">05 &mdash; Proposed Solution</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Phase 1 &mdash; Flow Proposal Automation (8 Modules)</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\" style=\"margin-bottom:10px;\">Phase 1 delivers end-to-end quotation automation with embedded CRM &mdash; a Microsoft-native AI solution comprising the following functional modules, integrated via Microsoft Power Automate, Azure AI Services, and SharePoint:</p>\n    <div class=\"deliverable-list\">\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">1</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Email Intake &amp; Intelligence Engine</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Continuously monitors the designated Outlook inbox for new quotation enquiry emails. Uses Azure AI / NLP to parse and extract: customer name, company, contact details, enquiry date, list of requested spare parts (part numbers, descriptions, quantities), and/or service requirements. Tags and classifies each email as Spare Parts, Services, or Mixed enquiry. Flags incomplete or ambiguous enquiries for manual review.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">2</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Customer Validation Gateway (Manual Touchpoint)</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Presents the parsed enquiry to the designated salesperson via an Outlook-based notification or Teams message. Salesperson confirms KYC status: Verified / Not Verified / Pending. Only upon KYC confirmation does the automated workflow proceed. Non-verified customers are queued for KYC processing; the enquiry is held pending clearance.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">3</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Knowledge Base Lookup Engine</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Accesses the Spare Parts Price List (PDF, hosted in SharePoint) using an AI-powered document search and extraction engine. Accesses the Service Rate Sheet (Excel or PDF, hosted in SharePoint) for hourly and daily rates. Matches enquiry line items to catalogue entries using fuzzy matching and semantic similarity. Returns matched items with part number, description, unit price, and quantity. Flags unmatched or partially matched items for salesperson review.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">4</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">RFQ Logging &amp; Proposal Number Generation</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Auto-populates the RFQ tracker (Excel/SharePoint List) with customer details, enquiry date, enquiry type, and line items. Generates a unique proposal number following Mode AE's existing numbering convention (e.g. MDA-2026-XXXX). Records the RFQ status as In Progress.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">5</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Quotation Document Generator</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Populates Mode AE's standard quotation template (hosted in SharePoint) with customer details, proposal/RFQ number and date, line items with part descriptions, quantities, unit prices, line totals, applicable service rates, grand total, and standard terms. Saves the generated quotation as PDF/Word in SharePoint under the relevant RFQ folder.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">6</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Review &amp; Approval Workflow</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Routes the generated quotation to the designated reviewer via an Outlook/Teams notification with a preview link. Reviewer can Approve, Reject, or Request Edits via a simple form or adaptive card. Edited quotations are re-routed for re-review before dispatch.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">7</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Automated Quotation Dispatch</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Upon approval, sends the quotation to the customer via the designated Outlook mailbox with the quotation document attached. Updates the RFQ tracker: records quotation value, sets status to Sent, logs dispatch timestamp. Archives the sent quotation in the relevant SharePoint folder.</div></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliverable-item\">\n        <div class=\"del-num\">8</div>\n        <div><div class=\"del-title\">Embedded CRM Module</div>\n        <div class=\"del-desc\">Built-in CRM layer within the proposal tool to log and track customer name, company, contact details, quotation amount, assigned salesperson, enquiry source, and deal status. Provides a centralised sales pipeline view with filters by salesperson, status, and date range. Eliminates the need for an external CRM system by capturing standard sales data directly within the quotation workflow. Reduces manual data entry errors and improves sales accountability and visibility.</div></div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"page-footer-left\">Betser Life &middot; admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com</div>\n    <div class=\"page-footer-right\">Mode AE &middot; BTR-2026-MODAE-02</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 5 — TECHNOLOGY STACK + INTEGRATION\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">06 &mdash; Technology</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Technology Stack</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\" style=\"margin-bottom:10px;\">The solution is built entirely on Microsoft-native technologies, ensuring seamless integration with Mode AE's existing infrastructure:</p>\n    <div class=\"card-grid-2\">\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#9993;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Microsoft Outlook</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Email monitoring, salesperson notifications, customer dispatch, and archive management.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128193;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Microsoft SharePoint / OneDrive</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Document storage for price lists, rate sheets, quotation templates, and generated documents.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128202;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Microsoft Excel / SharePoint Lists</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">RFQ tracker for logging enquiries, quotation values, statuses, and dispatch timestamps.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#9881;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Microsoft Power Automate</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Workflow orchestration and automation logic connecting all modules end-to-end.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#129302;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Azure AI / Cognitive Services</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">NLP-based email parsing, knowledge base search, and document extraction engine.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128161;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Azure OpenAI Service</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Intelligent matching using fuzzy search and semantic similarity for line item lookup.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128172;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Microsoft Teams (Optional)</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Reviewer notifications and approval actions via adaptive cards for faster response.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128274;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Microsoft 365 Authentication</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Single sign-on, role-based access control, and full audit trail via Azure AD.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex:1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">07 &mdash; Integration</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Integration Approach</div>\n    <div class=\"lead-quote\">\n      The solution will be deployed as a <strong>cloud-native Power Platform application</strong> within Mode AE's Microsoft 365 tenant. No additional on-premises infrastructure is required. Betser Life Pvt. Ltd. will deploy, configure, and test all modules within Mode AE's existing Microsoft environment, following Microsoft best practices for governance, security, and data residency.\n    </div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">All data remains within Mode AE's Microsoft 365 tenant boundaries. The solution leverages existing Microsoft 365 licenses wherever possible, with Azure AI consumption costs estimated separately post requirements finalisation.</p>\n    <p class=\"body-p\">The integration architecture ensures that each module operates independently yet communicates seamlessly through Power Automate flows, enabling easy maintenance, troubleshooting, and future enhancements without disrupting the entire pipeline.</p>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"page-footer-left\">Betser Life &middot; admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com</div>\n    <div class=\"page-footer-right\">Mode AE &middot; BTR-2026-MODAE-02</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 6 — DELIVERABLES + TIMELINE\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">08 &mdash; Deliverables</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Phase 1 Deliverables (Flow Proposal Automation)</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\" style=\"margin-bottom:8px;\">The following deliverables will be provided upon Phase 1 completion:</p>\n    <div class=\"card-grid-3\">\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#9993;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">1. Email Intake Engine</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Automated email monitoring and AI-powered NLP parsing module (Outlook-integrated).</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#10003;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">2. KYC Validation Gateway</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Customer verification touchpoint with approval/rejection workflow.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128269;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">3. KB Lookup Engine</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">AI-powered search across Spare Parts Price List and Service Rate Sheet.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128196;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">4. RFQ Logger</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Auto-logging and proposal number generation (Excel/SharePoint integrated).</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128462;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">5. Quotation Generator</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Template-based document generation with auto-population (SharePoint-integrated).</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128100;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">6. Review Workflow</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Approval routing via Outlook/Teams with approve, reject, and edit actions.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128232;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">7. Auto Dispatch</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Automated quotation email dispatch with tracker update and archiving.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128202;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">8. RFQ Tracker</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Integrated Excel/SharePoint Lists tracker with status, values, and timestamps.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128203;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">9. Embedded CRM</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Built-in CRM for customer data, quotation tracking, salesperson assignment, and pipeline visibility.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\">\n        <span class=\"card-icon\">&#128214;</span>\n        <div class=\"card-title\">10. Docs &amp; Training</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">System configuration documentation, user guide, operations manual, and training sessions.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex:1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">09 &mdash; Project Timeline</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Delivery Plan</div>\n    <div class=\"timeline\">\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-week\">Week 1&ndash;2</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-phase\">Kick-off &amp; Requirements Finalisation</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-desc\">Detailed requirements workshop with Mode AE team. Access provisioning to Microsoft 365 tenant, SharePoint, and Outlook. Review and formalise quotation template, price list, rate sheet formats, and RFQ tracker structure. Confirm proposal numbering convention and approval hierarchy.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-week\">Week 3&ndash;4</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-phase\">Email Intake, Knowledge Base Lookup &amp; RFQ Logging</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-desc\">Deploy email intake and NLP parsing engine. Configure knowledge base lookup against Spare Parts Price List and Service Rate Sheet. Build RFQ logging and proposal number generation module.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-week\">Week 5&ndash;6</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-phase\">Quotation Generator, Review Workflow &amp; Dispatch</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-desc\">Deploy quotation document generator with Mode AE template. Configure review and approval workflow. Deploy automated dispatch module with tracker integration.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-week\">Week 7</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-phase\">Integration Testing &amp; UAT Preparation</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-desc\">End-to-end integration testing using live and sample data. Bug fixes and optimisation. UAT environment setup and test case preparation.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n        <div class=\"timeline-dot\"></div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-week\">Week 8</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-phase\">UAT, Training &amp; Go-Live</div>\n        <div class=\"timeline-desc\">User acceptance testing with Mode AE team. User training sessions. Go-live deployment. Hypercare support period (2 weeks post go-live).</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    <div style=\"margin-top:12px; padding:10px 14px; background:var(--bg); border-radius:6px; border-left:3px solid var(--gold);\">\n      <div style=\"font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy);\">Total Effort: 50 Working Days (8&ndash;10 weeks from kick-off)</div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"page-footer-left\">Betser Life &middot; admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com</div>\n    <div class=\"page-footer-right\">Mode AE &middot; BTR-2026-MODAE-02</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 7 — COMMERCIALS\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">10 &mdash; Commercial Estimate</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Pricing Summary &mdash; Phase 1 + Phase 2</div>\n    <table class=\"pricing-table\">\n      <thead>\n        <tr>\n          <th>Phase / Module</th>\n          <th>Description</th>\n          <th>Amount (INR)</th>\n        </tr>\n      </thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr style=\"background:var(--bg);\"><td colspan=\"3\" style=\"font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); font-size:9px; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:6px 10px;\">Phase 1 &mdash; Flow Proposal (Quotation) Automation &mdash; 40%</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 1</td><td>Email Intake &amp; Intelligence Engine</td><td>&#8377; 32,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 2</td><td>Customer Validation Gateway</td><td>&#8377; 12,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 3</td><td>Knowledge Base Lookup Engine</td><td>&#8377; 35,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 4</td><td>RFQ Logging &amp; Proposal Number Generation</td><td>&#8377; 13,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 5</td><td>Quotation Document Generator</td><td>&#8377; 30,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 6</td><td>Review &amp; Approval Workflow</td><td>&#8377; 20,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 7</td><td>Automated Quotation Dispatch Module</td><td>&#8377; 15,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 8</td><td>Embedded CRM Module (Sales Pipeline &amp; Customer Data)</td><td>&#8377; 18,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Implementation</td><td>Configuration, testing, deployment, training</td><td>&#8377; 25,000</td></tr>\n        <tr class=\"subtotal-row\"><td colspan=\"2\"><strong>Phase 1 Subtotal</strong></td><td><strong>&#8377; 2,00,000</strong></td></tr>\n        <tr style=\"background:var(--bg);\"><td colspan=\"3\" style=\"font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); font-size:9px; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:6px 10px;\">Phase 2 &mdash; Project Proposal Automation &mdash; 60%</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 8</td><td>Intelligent Scope Analysis &amp; Requirements Parser</td><td>&#8377; 50,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 9</td><td>HW/SW/Services Breakdown Engine</td><td>&#8377; 45,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 10</td><td>Multi-Currency Conversion with Hedge Rates</td><td>&#8377; 35,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 11</td><td>Full Terms &amp; Conditions Generator</td><td>&#8377; 25,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 12</td><td>Project Proposal Document Generator</td><td>&#8377; 50,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Module 13</td><td>Accounting Software Integration</td><td>&#8377; 45,000</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Implementation</td><td>Configuration, testing, deployment, training</td><td>&#8377; 50,000</td></tr>\n        <tr class=\"subtotal-row\"><td colspan=\"2\"><strong>Phase 2 Subtotal</strong></td><td><strong>&#8377; 3,00,000</strong></td></tr>\n        <tr class=\"subtotal-row\"><td colspan=\"2\"><strong>Base Total &mdash; Phase 1 + Phase 2</strong></td><td><strong>&#8377; 5,00,000</strong></td></tr>\n        <tr><td colspan=\"2\">GST @ 18%</td><td>&#8377; 90,000</td></tr>\n        <tr class=\"total-row\"><td colspan=\"2\"><strong>Grand Total (Inclusive of GST)</strong></td><td>&#8377; 5,90,000</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n    <p class=\"fn\">* Base price: &#8377;5,00,000. GST (18%) of &#8377;90,000 is applicable and will be charged separately on invoices.</p>\n    <p class=\"fn\">* Microsoft 365 licensing costs (if any upgrades required) are not included and are to be borne by Mode AE.</p>\n    <p class=\"fn\">* Azure AI/OpenAI consumption costs will be estimated and presented separately post requirements finalisation.</p>\n\n    <div style=\"font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-top:14px;margin-bottom:2px;\">Payment Schedule</div>\n    <div class=\"payment-cards\">\n      <div class=\"payment-card\">\n        <div class=\"payment-pct\">40%</div>\n        <div class=\"payment-amt\">&#8377; 2,36,000</div>\n        <div class=\"payment-note\">Phase 1 &mdash; Flow Proposal Automation<br>&#8377;2,00,000 + GST &#8377;36,000<br>Due on Phase 1 kick-off</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"payment-card\">\n        <div class=\"payment-pct\">60%</div>\n        <div class=\"payment-amt\">&#8377; 3,54,000</div>\n        <div class=\"payment-note\">Phase 2 &mdash; Project Proposal Automation<br>&#8377;3,00,000 + GST &#8377;54,000<br>Due on Phase 2 kick-off</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    <p class=\"fn\" style=\"margin-top:10px;\">Payment to be made by bank transfer to Betser Life Pvt. Ltd. within 30 days of invoice date. Account details will be shared upon contract signing.</p>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"page-footer-left\">Betser Life &middot; admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com</div>\n    <div class=\"page-footer-right\">Mode AE &middot; BTR-2026-MODAE-02</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 8 — ASSUMPTIONS + EXCLUSIONS + WHY BETTROI\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">12 &mdash; Assumptions</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Project Assumptions</div>\n    <ul class=\"bullet-list\">\n      <li>Mode AE will provide timely access to their Microsoft 365 environment (Outlook, SharePoint, Excel).</li>\n      <li>The Spare Parts Price List (PDF) and Service Rate Sheet will be provided in a structured, machine-readable format. If the PDF is scanned or image-based, an OCR preprocessing step may be required (to be scoped separately).</li>\n      <li>Mode AE's existing quotation template will be provided in Word or PDF format for replication.</li>\n      <li>A designated project point of contact will be available from Mode AE throughout the engagement.</li>\n      <li>KYC verification will be performed manually by Mode AE staff prior to triggering automation.</li>\n      <li>Knowledge base updates (price changes, new parts, rate changes) will be managed by Mode AE; the system will reference the latest published version in SharePoint.</li>\n      <li>Review and approval hierarchy will be confirmed by Mode AE during kick-off.</li>\n    </ul>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">13 &mdash; Exclusions</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Exclusions (Not in Scope)</div>\n    <div class=\"card-grid-3\" style=\"margin-top:4px;\">\n      <div class=\"sec-card\" style=\"border-left:3px solid var(--border);\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">External ERP Integration</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Integration with third-party ERP systems is not included. Embedded CRM is in scope.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\" style=\"border-left:3px solid var(--border);\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Mobile Application</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">No mobile app development included. Access is via Microsoft 365 web and desktop.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"sec-card\" style=\"border-left:3px solid var(--border);\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Custom Branding / UI</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">No custom UI beyond Mode AE's standard quotation and proposal template formats.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <hr class=\"divider\">\n\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex:1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">14 &mdash; Why Betser</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Why Betser Life</div>\n    <p class=\"body-p\" style=\"margin-bottom:8px;\">Betser Life is a health-tech and technology solutions company headquartered in Thiruvananthapuram, India, with 15+ products across Healthcare, Digital AI, and Energy verticals, serving clients in 12+ countries with 25+ years of combined domain expertise.</p>\n    <div class=\"card-grid-2\" style=\"margin-top:4px;\">\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Microsoft 365 AI Expertise</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Deep expertise in Microsoft 365-native AI automation (Power Platform, Azure AI, SharePoint).</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Document Intelligence</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Proven experience in document AI and NLP-based extraction for industrial applications.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Structured Delivery</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Milestone-driven delivery methodology with full UAT support and hypercare.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"report-card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Global Reach, Local Expertise</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Serving 12+ countries with deep domain expertise in healthcare, industrial, and enterprise technology.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"page-footer-left\">Betser Life &middot; admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com</div>\n    <div class=\"page-footer-right\">Mode AE &middot; BTR-2026-MODAE-02</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════\n     PAGE 9 — TERMS + FOOTER\n══════════════════════════════════════ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"body-content\" style=\"flex:1;\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">15 &mdash; Terms &amp; Conditions</div>\n    <div class=\"section-heading\">Terms &amp; Conditions</div>\n    <ul class=\"terms-list\">\n      <li>This proposal is valid for <strong>30 days</strong> from the date of issue (April 2026).</li>\n      <li>The scope, timeline, and pricing outlined herein are indicative and subject to finalisation upon detailed requirements confirmation.</li>\n      <li>Betser Life Pvt. Ltd. reserves the right to revise pricing in the event of significant scope changes identified during kick-off.</li>\n      <li>All intellectual property developed under this engagement shall be governed by the terms of the formal Master Services Agreement (MSA) to be executed between Betser Life Pvt. Ltd. and Mode AE.</li>\n      <li>Mode AE to provide timely access to their Microsoft 365 environment, including Outlook, SharePoint, and Excel. Delays in provisioning access or credentials will result in a corresponding extension of the project timeline.</li>\n      <li>Scope changes after Week 2 will be quoted separately as formal Change Requests.</li>\n      <li>The hypercare support period of 2 weeks begins from go-live date. Extended support and AMC available upon request.</li>\n      <li>Microsoft 365 licensing costs (if any upgrades are required) are not included in this proposal and are to be borne by Mode AE.</li>\n      <li>Azure AI/OpenAI consumption costs will be estimated and presented separately post requirements finalisation. Recurring AI consumption costs are the responsibility of Mode AE.</li>\n      <li>GST (18%) will be applied on all invoices as per applicable Indian tax law. GST is charged separately and is not included in the base price of INR 5,00,000.</li>\n      <li>Betser's total liability is limited to the total base fees paid under this engagement (INR 5,00,000).</li>\n      <li>This document is <strong>confidential</strong> and for the sole use of Mode AE.</li>\n      <li>Governing law: UAE. Disputes to be resolved via Dubai International Arbitration Centre (DIAC).</li>\n    </ul>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"footer-band\">\n    <div class=\"footer-left\">\n      <div class=\"f-name\">Betser Life Pvt. Ltd.</div>\n      <div class=\"f-email\">admin@betserlife.com &middot; betserlife.com &middot; +91 9495 866 100</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"footer-center\">\n      <div style=\"font-size:20px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\">&rarr;</div>\n      <div style=\"margin-top:2px;\">Proposal &middot; April 2026</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"footer-right\">\n      <div class=\"f-client\">Mode AE</div>\n      <div class=\"f-address\">Spare Parts &amp; Services<br>Dubai, UAE</div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"footer-confidential\">\n    Confidential &amp; Proprietary &mdash; Betser Life &middot; For Mode AE Use Only\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n",
  "isImported": true,
  "sourceFile": "ModAE_ProposifyAI_TechnoCommercial_BTR-2026-MODAE-02.pdf",
  "originalPdfBase64": ""
}

## Pricing

```json
{}
```

```json

  "importedAt": "2026-05-14T12:28:25.476Z",
```
